/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/lib/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/window.cpp.o -o raycaster  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker OpenGL -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker OpenGL /usr/local/lib/libglfw.3.3.dylib
